title: CNBC Daily Open: AI race, potential tariffs and Middle East conflict continue to heat up
summary_full: The U.S.-China AI race continues to intensify amid signs that the Trump administration could sanction China over "theft," while OpenAI ramps up IPO efforts.
summary_public: The U.S.-China AI race continues to intensify amid signs that the Trump administration could sanction China over "theft," while OpenAI ramps up IPO efforts.
